model:
(define-fun __need_malloc_and_calloc () Bool
  false)
(define-fun __USE_EXTERN_INLINES () Bool
  false)

  false)
reasoning: xx is initialized at L7 (int16_t xx=x*10) immediately before being read at L8 (conv[0]=(xx>=0)?...). xx is always initialized. Pulse false positive. Note: both ULTRA_LCD=T (conv undeclared) and ULTRA_LCD=F (ftostr51 undeclared at call site) are non-compilable configs, but the alarm is at L8 inside the ULTRA_LCD block. PC = library macros only with no real feature flags confirms this is a desugaring artifact.
